name: Adarsh Hiremath
one_liner: Mercor is building AI vetting infrastructure to understand the exact tasks people are good at. Mercor's AI interviewer conducts superhuman interviews by asking questions tailored to every candidate's individual background.

name: Alexandra Debow
one_liner: swsh will be there to capture your memories - every celebration, birthday, and vacation - with an AI-powered shared photo album, ensuring you can make those unforgettable experiences happen again and again.

name: Augustus Doricko
one_liner: Rainmaker is fulfilling humanity's role as responsible stewards of the Earth through pioneering advanced cloud-seeding technology to combat drought and transform deserts into habitable landscapes.

name: Brendan Foody
one_liner: Mercor is creating a unified global labor market capable of facilitating interviews and evaluations of everyone on Earth. Labor aggregation is the most impactful opportunity in history.

name: Charlie Wu
one_liner: Orchard Robotics is putting eyes on each of the billions of fruit in orchards, and using AI to help farmers feed the world with the best food they've ever grown.

name: Christopher Zhu
one_liner: Etched is building the hardware for superintelligence, starting with transformer-specific AI chips that run models at unprecedented speeds and scale.

name: Diogenes Casares
one_liner: Stream seamlessly integrates the benefits of centralized exchanges with the decentralized nature of DeFi, enhancing liquidity and security while eliminating custodial risks and reshaping the landscape of crypto trading.

name: Gavin Uberti
one_liner: Etched was founded because the next 100x of scale requires silicon to be customized for a model's architecture. Flexible AI chips don't make sense in a world where training a single model costs more than designing an entire chip.

name: Govind Gnanakumar
one_liner: Automorphic is creating AI models that learn new information more efficiently than humans.

name: Felipe Meneses
one_liner: Hyperplane is a data intelligence platform that empowers financial institutions to make multi-billion dollar decisions using specialized LLMs trained on consumer banking data.

name: Jacob Rodriguez
one_liner: Oligo is revolutionizing the production of space-grade hardware and orbit-ready spacecraft through making the process as efficient and accessible as manufacturing car parts.

name: Joseph Semrai
one_liner: Explore Interfaces is developing a contextual LLM-based operating system, enabling hyper-personalized applications and challenging long-held assumptions about human-computer interaction.

name: Luke Farritor
one_liner: The Vesuvius Challenge is accelerating the reading of the Herculaneum Papyri, the last surviving library of the Roman Empire.

name: Pavel Asparouhov
one_liner: Silna is streamlining patient intake and building a more efficient infrastructure to allow providers to focus on world-class care and ease the trillion-dollar tax burden of the US healthcare system.

name: Peter Hansen
one_liner: Januus is mapping cryptowallets to physical locations and people on a global scale.

name: Robert Wachen
one_liner: Etched is solving the compute cost and speed bottlenecks hampering every company on this list. Specialized AI chips are inevitable and will change the world.

name: Surya Midha
one_liner: Mercor is utilizing AI vetting to create opportunities for millions of smart people who were previously undiscovered due to society's misplaced reliance on flawed signals like resume prestige.

name: Tarun Amasa
one_liner: Endex is building the first autonomous and super-intelligent financial analyst.

name: Walden Yan
one_liner: Cognition AI is an applied AI lab focused on reasoning. Their flagship product Devin, an AI software engineer and teammate, is ushering in a new era of economic prosperity.

name: Yash Patil
one_liner: OpenAI research engineer evaluating language models and creating systems for machines to collaborate with less human oversight.
